plugins.name: snip-plugin
plugins.description: A plugin that reduce noise from commands logs and outputs, by keeping only the most relevant information for LLMs, such as error messages, warnings, and key results.

plugins.name: token-saving-cli
plugins.description: Collection of efficient CLI tools and workflows optimized for minimal context usage and one-shot patterns with LLMs

plugins.name: java-utilities
plugins.description: A plugin that provides utilities to investigate and manipulate Java bytecode to help with reverse engineering, debugging, and security research tasks.
